wine_schools.name: Oenologie au Domaine JP Riviere
wine_schools.address: 520 Chemin des Grands Taillis, 69480 Lachassagne, France
wine_schools.description: A certified wine school at a family estate in the Pierres Dorees holding the Vignobles et Decouvertes quality label. Initiation to oenology covering wine aromas, tasting methodology, and white and red wine comparisons. EUR 55 per adult; tasting of 5 wines with charcuterie included.

wine_schools.name: Ateliers Oenologiques au Domaine Christophe Savoye
wine_schools.description: Producer-led oenology workshops in the Chiroubles cru. Christophe Savoye guides groups of 2 to 8 through an initiation to tasting, grape varieties, terroir, and food pairings in 90 minutes, concluding with a traditional Beaujolais snack and optional old-vintage tastings.

wine_schools.name: Ateliers Oenologiques au Domaine Augris
wine_schools.address: 604 Route de Morgon, Morgon le Haut, 69910 Villie-Morgon, France
wine_schools.description: Qualified oenologist Annie Augris offers Beaujolais Cru discovery workshops at her family domain in the upper Morgon hamlet. Courses cover the grands crus, tasting initiation, vine cultivation, and pruning techniques. EUR 30 per person by reservation.

verified.address_quoted: 604, route de Morgon, Morgon le Haut, 69910 Villie-Morgon

wine_schools.name: Atelier Assemblage au Domaine des Pampres d'Or
wine_schools.description: An organic estate in the Pierres Dorees offers wine-blending workshops: a 2.5-hour session covering domaine tour, barrel tastings, blending instruction, and bottling of your own cuvee to take home. Maximum 10 participants. EUR 75 per adult.
wine_schools.tip: You leave with a labelled bottle of your own blend; an excellent gift for a wine-focused stay.

wine_schools.name: Esprits de Vins Wine School
wine_schools.description: France's oldest WSET-approved training centre, accredited since 1991 and offering all levels from WSET 1 to Diploma in Wines. Located in Macon at the Beaujolais-Burgundy gateway, with Beaujolais wines prominently featured across the Burgundy module. Free shuttle from Macon station.
wine_schools.price_range: Variable by level; WSET 2 from EUR 590; Diploma from EUR 3,200

wine_schools.name: La Maison des Beaujolais Ateliers
wine_schools.description: Guided initiation workshops led by Master Sommelier Guillaume Mithieux at the Maison des Beaujolais. Sessions cover all 12 appellations, tasting technique, and food pairing with local produce. Structured tasting flights from EUR 15 per person.
course_types: Introduction to Gamay and Beaujolais styles
Food and wine pairing with local products
wine_schools.price_range: From EUR 15 per person for structured tasting
